name: skill-validator
description: Validate Codex skill directories before use, sharing, or publishing.

interface.shortDescription: Validate Codex skill folders and metadata.
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin that bundles the skill-validator skill and a uv-friendly validator script for checking SKILL.md structure, metadata, optional OpenAI agent metadata, and unresolved placeholders before using or publishing a skill.
defaultPrompt: Use Skill Validator to validate this Codex skill directory.
Use Skill Validator to check whether this skill is ready to publish.
